name: Fudge Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the cocoa powder, confectioners' sugar, and milk in the top of a double boiler over boiling water until smooth.
2. Add the chocolate chips and stir until the chips are melted.
3. Stir and lower the heat to simmer.
4. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites until soft peaks form.
5. Fold the vanilla and 1/2 cup of the chocolate mixture into the egg white mixture.
6. Bring the water in the bottom of the double boiler back to a boil.
7. Stir the chocolate-egg white mixture into the chocolate mixture in the top of the double boiler.
8. Using an electric beater or whisk, beat this mixture for one minute or until it is well combined.
9. Cover the double boiler and continue to cook over boiling water for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the souffle is puffed and set.
10. Serve with Lofat whipped topping, if desired.
Serves 4
